hotel_name: Khách sạn Brown Dot Sân bay Sài Gòn (Brown Dot Hotel Saigon Airport)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Terrible smell in room had to leave day early was that bad. Breakfast that was a joke. Pillows and bed only good thing, they need sort the smell made me physically sick and fridge in room did not work

reviews.title: Horrible expetience
reviews.positives: The hotel had no room for me although i had booked ahead of time. I had to find another hotel at midnight in a new city and foreign country. Dishonest and non cooperative reception person. Very bad experience. Do NOT recommend this hotel.
reviews.negatives: Nothing.

reviews.title: Bathroom clogged whole time
reviews.text:
Location isn't good, I saw a rat on the street , water pressure is low 
Bathroom clogged whole time. The only good thing was staffe members are so nice

reviews.title: A very disappointing stay with poor facilities, lack of cleanliness, and unresolved issues. Definitely not worth the pri
reviews.positives: Near the airport and have lots of shops nearby. The outside security guy was much helpful and friendly
reviews.negatives:
The facilities were very outdated and poorly maintained. The door and windows didn’t close properly and offered little soundproofing. The toilet seat was loose, and both the sink and bathroom drains were clogged.

The air conditioner was extremely slow and made loud, unpleasant noises. We reported this to the staff, and although they came to check, no action was taken to fix the issue.

There was also significant noise from nearby construction at the front of the property. Cleanliness was below standard, and despite booking a non-smoking room, there was a strong smell of smoke that was overwhelming upon arrival.

Considering the price especially compared to other airport hotels, this stay was not good value for money at all.

reviews.title: Good soft bed
reviews.text: Probably the best bed for the bucks, it’s a bit away from the city center but good for an airport hotel if you fly out early

reviews.title: I would not recommend this hotel
reviews.positives: Close to the airport
reviews.negatives: My 1st room didn’t have a window and my 2nd room had a shower that didn’t drain

reviews.title: Well, it's okay.
reviews.text:
It's okay if you need to stay one night at the airport.  
The price feels the cheapest, but the room has no window and is small.  
It's just decent in terms of cleanliness.  
If you're booking because of the free breakfast, I wouldn't recommend it.  
The breakfast is not really breakfast; the watermelon looks like it's been around for a while, and I took one bite and didn't eat it.  
The only thing they serve that is somewhat decent is the noodles; the rest isn't even at the level of what you would call breakfast.  
If breakfast is important to you, you should definitely avoid coming here.  
I came thinking there would be ramen, but that's just for sale.  
It seems like the ice-making machine won't work much.  
For that price, there are plenty of rooms in Ho Chi Minh.

reviews.title: NOT SATISFIED
reviews.positives: Location is good
reviews.negatives: The room and the bathroom are small.

reviews.title: Staying near the airport
reviews.text: I chose this location to get to the airport faster which about 10 mins to the international terminal still .  The rooms are clean and the beds are comfortable like the hotel in America (I mean the bed’s height and soft).  I don’t like the shower in the bathtub in room 506 because the water can get to the floor around the toilet.  There was no hot water when I showered at 2am.  I had room 506 and the AC controller is mounted fixed on the wall and the AC was setup to shut off after 180 minutes which woke me up in the middle of the night because hot.  Also you have to insert the room card in the slot to get the power for the room meaning the AC, refrigerator and lights are all off when leaving the room which is suck. The breakfast is not good.

reviews.title: Good value and comfortable for basic hotel
reviews.positives: Convenient location
reviews.negatives: Breakfast was ok.  Not great.  Very basic

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Needed to ask for the room to be cleaned. The staff were very helpful and friendly. The noise is a nuisance but there’s no carpet to absorb the noise. Very convenient and close to everything

reviews.title: Good for the cost and the need for a one night stay
reviews.positives: Close to airport, good breakfast
reviews.negatives: Loud music during breakfast, just not my type of morning vibe, also construction nearby that started at 9am and was continuous for an hour. Not their fault, but difficult after short sleep

reviews.title: Airport stopover
reviews.text: We needed 1 night’s accommodation close to Saigon Airport for a morning departure.  It was a cheap Grab ride away from the airport.  There were convenience stores very close by.  The bed was comfy and clean. The shower was powerful. The bathroom equipped with toothbrushes, razor etc. The breakfast was not great although the coffee was fine. I would not recommend it for more than 1 night but we paid *** for the night which I thought was a very fair price.

reviews.title: Clean and great value
reviews.positives: Nice staff at front desk. Very clean . I had a front room so had a window. Had everything I needed for one overnight stay.

reviews.title: Comfortable but can be improved.
reviews.text:
Easy location to airport, simple breakfast provided that is convenient. Lack of workspace in room could be an issue for some.
Soundproofing is not ideal, hotel can consider weather strips to insulate sounds from within the hotel and corridor

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Close to the airport

reviews.title: Comfort and clean
reviews.text: Comfort and clean

reviews.title: A reasonable choice for an overnight stay.
reviews.positives: Our room was comfortable and we appreciated the city view from the 6th floor.   The reception staff were friendly and helpful.   The local area had lots of food outlets, convenience stores and coffee shops.
reviews.negatives: The breakfast buffet had limited choice, but was adequate.   I was surprised, and disappointed, that the banh my was not fresh, and the coffee was not hot.   There was not much space in our room for our 2 large suitcases.

reviews.title: Long huynh
reviews.text: Nice and very clean hotel also right next to the Tan son nhất airport

reviews.title: Ok for a stay on arrival
reviews.positives: Clean professional
reviews.negatives: Further than they stated from airport

reviews.title: Wonderful staff,clean secure,great breakfast
reviews.text: This was the second time we stayed at the hotel. Very handy for the airport a little bit far from the centre but only a cheap grab right away. The staff were excellent and a true asset to the business. Excellent breakfast clean and tidy rooms. I’d highly recommend.

reviews.title: Ideal last night before early flight out of Ho Chi Minh International Airport
reviews.positives: Clean, comfortable, good bed and shower
reviews.negatives: Our room did not have a window

reviews.title: Near Airport
reviews.text: Hotel akceptowalny. Idealny na 1 noc blisko lotniska w celach przesiadkowych. Komfort jest ok. Mój pokój był dosyć głośny ze względu na jednostkę zewnętrzna klimatyzacji za oknem ale było to akceptowalne. Ogólnie za tą cenę mozna być zadowolonym. W okolicy dużo punktów z jedzeniem sklep 24h czy apteki.

reviews.title: Good spot before departing airport or late arrival.
reviews.positives: Close to airport. Small room but clean and comfortable. Location near many “local” restaurants.
reviews.negatives: WiFi was substandard. Very slow.

reviews.title: Great hotel near airport
reviews.text: 10 mins from airport with fantastic newish building. Rooms are great which are functional but lack any natural light. Bathrooms are beautiful with great shower pressure. Large smart TV with Netflix access. Bed super comfortable. Only downsides to this hotel is a nightclub nearby which has music till 3am and general location doesn’t have much

reviews.title: A transit time in Saigon
reviews.positives: Nice staff, helpful.
reviews.negatives: Room quite small.

reviews.title: Tốt
reviews.text: Phòng mới thiết kế khá đẹp, giường êm ái, TV lớn có netflix, điều hoà Daikin, vòi nước điều chỉnh nóng lạnh dc, gần sân bay, gần nhất nhà ga T3, chỉ thiếu cây treo quần áo, thiếu móc treo khăn, quần áo trong phòng tắm, phòng rẻ nhất ko có cửa sổ

reviews.title: a great value hotel in the airport district
reviews.positives:
breakfast was good
the hotel looks brand new
rooms are large and nicely appointed

reviews.title: Good for a few nights.
reviews.text:
It's super clean, a huge 65-70 inch smart TV with free Netflix account. 
Breakfast on the 8th floor is basic but good enough. The general design is really smart and cool, the only negative is that non of the rooms have any views or natural daylight except for the ones on the 8th floor but they will cost more. The window faces a gap between buildings, but absolutely no day light. If you want a cool, clean room and not worried about natural light then I would recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: A nice short stay
reviews.positives: Very comfortable, close to the airport, and many restaurants
reviews.negatives: A bit small, ok breakfast, lack of hooks in the bathroom to hang towels and clothes.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: This place has a great location, convenient for getting around and close to shopping areas. The bathroom is clean with hot water always available, providing a comfortable feeling. The staff are friendly and very helpful, however, the breakfast could be improved. The amenities generally meet the needs well, but if you want a more abundant breakfast, you might need to look for other options.

reviews.title: Affordable stay near the airport.
reviews.positives: Friendly staff
reviews.negatives: Although the room was very clean, I did notice a cockroach curing under the bed in the morning.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Great stay overall – clean room, friendly staff, and good location. Just minus one point for the lack of a bidet spray, which would have made it perfect.

reviews.title: excellent
reviews.positives: very nice and easy to find. walking was easy for local area.

reviews.title: Good location with plenty of street foods and drinks
reviews.text: good location with plenty of street foods and drinks, close by to the airport if you don't want to missed your flight, only issue from me is the cleanliness of the room, i think the cleaner missed the corners without sweeping.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The room is cozy

reviews.title: Friendly staffs, hotel clean
reviews.text: Friendly staffs, hotel clean, nice and busy location. Highly recommended

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
The bed was so very comfortable, as were the pillows and sheets! Four pillows...yea! The room itself was small but great for a night or two when arriving into or leaving Ho Chi Minh. 
Be aware there is no closet, just a few hooks to hang either towels or clothes. There is room to add more hooks. Hopefully, the management will do that in the future.
reviews.negatives: As mentioned. The lack of hooks for hanging clothes or towels.

reviews.title: Great airport hotel
reviews.text:
Great hotel if you're staying at the airport although you'll probably still need a taxi or Grab to get there.
Fairly basic rooms, but cool, clean, comfortable, you'll get a good night's sleep. 
In fact, I stayed there twice, once when arriving in Vietnam, and then again the night before I left.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Location close to the airport

reviews.title: I have been doing well.
reviews.text: I stayed at this hotel for 3 days. The reason is that it was cheap. Since I needed to stay for 3 days and 2 nights, I chose a place that is close to the airport and a bit affordable. Everything is great except for the location. The Grab fare is a bit pricey, but the hotel looks a bit old. However, the bed is big and comfortable, and there is a big TV that allows access to YouTube and Netflix. At first, I was surprised that there was not much to eat for breakfast, but the Vietnamese noodles and pasta were okay. It's nice that they have Shin Ramyeon too. There are many local restaurants and cafes near the hotel, and there are two convenience stores right next to the accommodation, and the banh mi below costs only 22,000 dong but was delicious. If I go again with other people, I might choose a slightly better hotel, but if I'm alone, I'd probably stay here again.

reviews.title: Room very clean.breakfast not good but I’mnot expectit
reviews.positives: Room very clean
reviews.negatives: air conditioning little hot

reviews.title: The review is late.
reviews.text: It was a nice accommodation that I used affordably last year. The location isn't great as it's close to the airport, but the price makes it a good value. There was Korean ramen for breakfast, and the breakfast was nice as well.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The room was very clean and had a big screen TV.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Phòng có một chiếc TV siêu to khổng lồ. Phòng sạch sẽ, xung quanh đi lại thuận tiện, không quá xa sân bay. Nhân viên thân thiện.

reviews.title: Comfortable Stay
reviews.positives: Friendly & helpful staff, clean & safe building. Well maintained and comfortable.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is very nice, clean, and the water pressure is strong even on the upper floor. The bed is very soft, and the size of the room is just right with all the necessary amenities. However, the breakfast is limited for those who eat coffee and bread.

reviews.title: Lovely clean hotel with great staff.  Was close to eateries and small grocery marts.
reviews.positives: The hotel was lovely, clean and the layout was perfect.  Bed was super comfortable and it was great getting 4 pillows instead of two.  Our room had a little table and L shaped lounge sitting area perfect. Bonus was the big TV and having access to Netflix courtesy of the Hotel.  Staff were very friendly and helpful especially getting our luggage.  Bathroom was clean and modern.  Would definitely stay here again when coming back to Saigon.
reviews.negatives: Not applicable.

reviews.title: Thank you to the staff for a wonderful stay!
reviews.text: We had a great day and we were glad we chose the executive room. It was really nice to have a little table to sit in and to sort out our luggage. The bathroom is clean water excellent etc very nice breakfast buffet. It’s a little far from the centre, but the grab taxi ride is cheap and efficient. It is however close to the airport just a few dollars away.

reviews.title: Fast service & Comfortable, Best sleep I had in days!
reviews.positives: Friendly, super helpful, great bed, OK breakfast
reviews.negatives: Not a great part of the city, a little hard to find, but surprisingly nice

reviews.title: Good for layover
reviews.text:
Close to the airport. 
Deluxe room has a tiny window, but faces a building so there is no daylight coming in. 
Bed is comfy with fluffy pillow, AC and free Netflix. 
Very comfortable stay for my layover.

reviews.title: Very pleased
reviews.positives: Dot Hotel is a budget-friendly hotel affordable rate and convenient location only situated 20 minutes walking distance from Terminal 3 Ho Chi Minh airport and located in the middle of the main street surrounded by convenient shop and take away food. This is a modern building with access to the reception area by a front porch. The room is made of a separated bathroom clean and comfortable. The interior design is modern look,  functional, fitted with a king size bed, air conditioning. Multimedia and wifi (strength signal) are both in good working order. Breakfast is a buffet style from continental to local. My stay was exactly as expected very pleased.
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is clean and spacious, the staff is friendly and helpful, breakfast is not various but good enough

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: It is a nice clean place. The Wi-Fi is works. The staffs are speak some English and friendly.

reviews.title: Perfect Stay
reviews.text: We stayed one night, everything was perfect. The staff were very kind and helpful, the room was very clean and comfortable! I would recommend 100%

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything is perfect
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Good place. Value money!
reviews.text: Brown Dot Hotel is conveniently located near T3 station and right next to GS25. The hotel is very new, spotless, and well-equipped. The highlight is definitely the bed – extra spacious and incredibly comfortable, more than enough for two people. Breakfast doesn’t have too many options, but it’s sufficient. Highly recommended!

reviews.title: Bien calidad precio
reviews.positives: Cerca del aeropuerto. Práctico ya que estuvimos solo un día y al dia para visitar y am siguiente cogíamos vuelo. Práctico y buen precio. Pero sí que es verdad que nuestra habitación no tenía ventana. Y el aire acondicionado olía un poco a humedad. Pero vaya, para una o pocas noches muy bien la verdad
reviews.negatives: Nuestra habitación no tenía ventana, aunque creo que eso se puede elegir. Y el aire olía un poco a humedad

reviews.title: A wonderful place for those who love minimalist style.
reviews.text: A new hotel, convenient and designed in a minimalist style. The staff is enthusiastic. I only have a small suggestion that breakfast needs to be more varied. ^^

reviews.title: Muy buena opción cerca del aeropuerto
reviews.positives: Muy cerca del aeropuerto, lo cual es genial si solo tienes que hacer noche. Habitación grande y equipada con todo. La TV es enorme. La cama muy cómoda.
reviews.negatives: El desayuno quizás no nos entusiasmó mucho, pero por el precio que tiene es muy razonable.

reviews.title: Great place near Terminal 3
reviews.text: This place offers fantastic value with its location close to the airport, making it super convenient for travellers. The room is clean and the staff are friendly.

reviews.title: Hotel súper correcto y limpio junto al aeropuerto
reviews.positives: Es un hotel sencillo pero muy correcto y muy limpio. Perfecto cuando estás de conexión en HMC y necesitas un hotel cerca del aeropuerto
reviews.negatives: El baño no olía bien pero creo que era por reflujo de las cañerías porque estaba muy limpio

reviews.title: Good customer service
reviews.text: The room is clean, good location. Especially thanks to all the staff, they are doing the great job.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Le doy un 10 porque me quede sorprendida de lo bonita y bien que estaba la habitacion. Solo nos quedamos 1 noche porque ya nos volviamos a casa pero estaba super bien por el precio, obviamente siempre y cuando quieras quedarte cerca del aeropuerto si no tener en cuenta que no estais cerca del centro y tendreis que coger un Grab.
reviews.negatives: La habitacion tenia una ventana diminuta pero a nosotros particularmente no es era indiferente ya que habia aire acondicionado.

reviews.title: Solo traveler here
reviews.text: Stayed for 3D2N, I wish I stayed here longer than my other hotel. Everything you would need is here except microwave and bidet (i dont know if they have on other rooms, i was on 603) but aside from that everything was more than satisfactory. I had just been on surgery so I needed to stay in bed. The TV is huge and I loved just to lay on the soft bed and watch my series. You can have food delivered to the reception but they dont bring it to your room unlike other hotels i stayed in.. but for the price it was so worth it. Very clean, modern. I love it.

reviews.title: Proximité de l'aéroport.
reviews.positives:
La qualité du couchage. 
La proximité de l'aéroport si c'est le but recherché (5 minutes en taxi ).
reviews.negatives:
C'est vieillot, fade, la décoration est moche. 
Plutôt déprimant.

reviews.title: The room is clean, the price is reasonable, and the staff is enthusiastic.
reviews.text: The hotel is clean. The staff is enthusiastic, and breakfast includes omelette, shrimp noodle soup with orange juice, fresh milk, yogurt, and fruit. The large TV has Netflix, which is very enjoyable. I stayed in room 304, and there was one issue: when I turned on the exhaust fan in the toilet, there was a quite unpleasant sewage smell. When I noticed it, I turned it off, and the smell went away. I hope the hotel can fix this issue, as my friend's room 305 did not have the problem. Everything else was very wonderful and worth staying.

reviews.title: Proche de l'aéroport mais pas agréable
reviews.positives: L'accueil est courtois. La situation géographique proche de l'aéroport
reviews.negatives: Une serviette avec des tâches sanglantes (qu'ils ont changé rapidement). La clim du voisin qui faisait beaucoup de bruit. La douchette qui ne marchait pas la nuit et qui finalement a fait une mini inondation le matin (coupure d'eau la nuit et ne s'est pas éteinte ?) Chambre minuscule avec écran géant (aucun intérêt)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Honestly, I’d give the hotel a 10/10 just for the service. All the doormen were incredibly helpful, and the staff were so nice and calm. Breakfast included (depends on your booking)  and we love the fried Korean instant noodle with egg. 
 
The room was just the right size for two people. There wasn’t a wardrobe, but since we kept our clothes in our luggage, the wall mounted coat rack (hanger hooks) were enough for us. Also, this is the first hotel under 4stars in Sai Gon for my whole month trip that has acceptable soundproofing.

Overall, a very pleasant experience!

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Assez proche aéroport pour le départ
reviews.negatives: Le bruit extérieur des appareils de climatisation toute la nuit. Sans doute une partie d'hélice qui frotte...

reviews.title: Nice, clean, fresh
reviews.text: Prolly the freshest and most posh small hotel near the airport. Message replies to hotel queries could be improved because I asked for airport transfer and they never got back in touch with me. Would still recommend.

reviews.title: Bon rapport qualité prix
reviews.positives:
Bon rapport qualité prix 
Personnel très accueillant et sympathique
reviews.negatives: Ras

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: New hotel and excellent facilities, near T3 SGN

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: La chambre spacieuse et propre lit confortable
reviews.negatives: Seul bémol la chambre était située près des climatiseurs extérieurs donc assez bruyant.

reviews.title: I'm very satisfied.
reviews.text: The clean environment, friendly staff, and a collection of Korean noodles, among other things, are very satisfying.

reviews.title: Bon repos , proche de l’aéroport
reviews.positives: Confort et propreté
reviews.negatives: Manque un sèche cheveux!

reviews.title: Great experience, fully equipped amenities.
reviews.text: The room is spacious, clean with stable Wi-Fi, along with a garden and a pool that are very relaxing. Friendly and enthusiastic staff create a comfortable feeling throughout the stay. The convenient location makes it easy to move around and explore the surroundings. The value received is commensurate with the cost, very worth experiencing.

reviews.title: Correct. Suffisant pour une nuit avant de partir pour l'aéroport.
reviews.positives:
Proximité de l'aéroport.
Confort suffisant pour une nuit mais pas plus.
Accueil agréable (mais peu de service si vous avez un problème de clim).
reviews.negatives:
Pas de fenêtre (ne pas être claustrophobe).
Chambre petite.
Pas grand chose dans l'hôtel et les environ.
Problème de clim (ne refroidissait pas du tout), nous avons appelé un technicien qui est passé mais n'a rien fait et n'ai jamais revenu ! Heureusement qu'on est resté qu'une nuit.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: giá 1 đêm cũg khá cao so với vị trí này nhưng bù lại có ăn sáng, ks thơm tho, phòng rộng rãi, nv dễ thương, mền gối êm ái

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Le personnel est très accueillant, un hôtel sans étoile avec une très bonne literie , et un très bon petit déjeuner Je recommande cet hôtel

reviews.title: Highly recommended
reviews.text: The room was spacious, clean, and comfortable. The staff were polite and always greeted with a smile. The location is great, with convenience stores nearby and Highlands Coffee just around the corner. Complimentary breakfast included

reviews.title: Ideal pour attendre son vol
reviews.positives: Ça correspondait à mes attentes en tout point, pour un court séjour avant de prendre l'avion
reviews.negatives: Petit déjeuner succint

reviews.title: Good value hotel.
reviews.text: Great hotel near the airport. Great tv for all the latest news in English; YouTube and Netflix available to watch.

reviews.title: Très bien
reviews.positives: Très pratique, propre et agréable

reviews.title: Great stay, comfy bed
reviews.text: We stayed for a night before our flight and it was comfortable, clean and new

reviews.title: Parfait pour une escale ou plus
reviews.positives: Parfaitement situé entre l’aéroport et la ville pour découvrir en 24h ou plus. Déjeuner copieux et varié
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Brown Dot Hotel
reviews.text:
Beautiful boutique hotel!
Quite! Most comfortable bed I've slept on while traveling! 
The quality of the sheets was the icing on the cake! 
Rooftop breakfast! Great Staff!
I can't remember smiling so much once I got under the covers!
I didn't want to get up!
It was a perfect! Comfortable! 
I will definitely stay there on my next visit!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Lit très confortable. Chambre et salle de bain très propre. Pas de bruit de la rue.

reviews.title: New hotel
reviews.text: Recommended! Very good quality of mattress and bedsheets!  10 minutes to airport by taxi.

reviews.title: Séjour à Ho Chi Minh City
reviews.positives: Près de l'aéroport et qui accueille même en pleine nuit ! Nous sommes arrivés en pleine nuit suite à un retard d'avion. La réception était encore ouverte. Nous avons prolongé notre séjour à 3 nuits vu le confort de l'hôtel et le copieux petit déjeuner !
reviews.negatives: Un peu loin du centre ville mais on ne peut pas tout avoir vu la proximité avec l'aéroport !

reviews.title: Tốt, sạch sẽ
reviews.text: Khách sạn sạch sẽ , trang thiết bị mới, đặc biệt ti vi to đẹp.

reviews.title: Parfait pour se reposer avant un départ en avion.
reviews.positives:
Proximité de l’aéroport, propreté, calme (excellente insonorisation), service impeccable.
Design de l’hôtel.
reviews.negatives: Petit-déjeuner très léger (peu de choix) mais service très gentil et belle vue.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Nice and clean.  Very helpful staff

reviews.title: Super bequeme Betten, schaut welches Zimmer ihr bucht
reviews.positives: Die Betten sind super bequem
reviews.negatives:
Die Mitarbeiter sind eine Katastrophe und ich habe mich sehr unwohl gefühlt 
Ich habe ich ein Zimmer mit Schlafsofa gebucht, aber nicht bekommen! Zahlen sollte ich trotzdem… beim Check out durfte ich dann das Hotel nicht verlassen, bis jemand das Zimmer kontrolliert hat. Ich sowas wirklich noch nie erlebt

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Smooth and easy checking very pleasant and professional staff. Had a greatfuls nights rest after being extremely exhausted.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Ok für die 4 Stunden Schlaf
reviews.negatives: Fenster mit Blick in einen Schacht

reviews.title: Best hotel near airport saigon
reviews.text: Very nice hotel near airport ho chi min. New hotel with new design, staff so good and clean

reviews.title: Für zwei einzelne Übernachtungen völlig ausreichend!
reviews.positives:
Das Brown Dot Hotel Saigon liegt günstig in der Nähe des Flughafen von Saigon! 
Die Zimmer sind gut ausgestattet, aber doch sehr klein!
Schön war das Angebot, das wir unsere Koffer für zwei Tage dort stehen lassen konnten, eine Mekong Tour zu machen!
reviews.negatives: Der Eingang hatte viele Treppenstufen!

reviews.title: Value for money hotel
reviews.text: I arrived at Ho Chi Minh Airport at night and had to go back to the airport the next morning, so I searched for and booked a nearby place, which turned out to be a hotel with great value for money. There were plenty of amenities like restaurants and convenience stores close to the hotel, so I had no inconveniences, and the staff was very friendly. I plan to visit again next time.

reviews.title: Würde ich auf jeden Fall wieder buchen
reviews.positives:
Lage:   für mich TOP! nahe des Int´l Airport SGN
Zimmer: sehr ruhig 
Frühstück: absolut in Ordnung. Der Frühstücksraum befindet sich in der 8 Etage mit herrlichem Blick 
In der Nähe: alles was man benötigt

reviews.title: Perfect hotel
reviews.text: I love this hotel

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Gemütliches Bett. Sauberkeit war ok aber das Personal war mega freundlich!

reviews.title: Exceptional Stay Experience
reviews.text: This property offers outstanding value with its prime location, making it easy to explore the area. The cleanliness is impeccable, and the staff are genuinely friendly and helpful. Facilities are top-notch, featuring reliable Wi-Fi and a comfortable bathroom setup that ensures a good night's sleep. Breakfast is a delightful start to the day, adding to the overall positive experience of the stay.

reviews.title: Optimale Zwischenstation nach der Ankunft oder vor der Abreise
reviews.positives: Für den Preis ein sehr gutes Frühstück. Mein Zimmer war sehr sauber und in einem hervorragenden Zustand. Ein außergewöhnlich gutes Preis-Leistungsverhältnis.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is a bit small, but in return, it's very clean. I stayed for one night to catch a flight, so I couldn't experience breakfast here. Even though I checked in late, the staff was very enthusiastic, gentle, and helped with the luggage right to the room. If I have the chance, I will definitely come back.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Zimmer

reviews.title: Convenient Layover
reviews.text: If you’re looking for a long layover with comfort, this is the place! I highly recommend it as the staff was very kind and super helpful! Thank you so much!

reviews.title: Ideal in Flughafennähe
reviews.positives: Die Nähe zum neuen Terminal 3. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und aufmerksam. Das Bett sehr bequem und weich. In Kombination mit dem riesen Fernseher perfekt. Das Frühstück war frisch und es passte immer jemand auf der nachgefüllt hat. Wir konnten ohne Probleme Mitternacht einchecken.

reviews.title: Satisfied
reviews.text: The hotel is new, aesthetically pleasing; the rooms are not too big but are fully equipped with amenities, and I am very satisfied. The room is clean and has no strange smells. The location is very close to Terminal 3 of Tan Son Nhat Airport. There's a Ministop nearby, which is very convenient. Overall, I am very satisfied with my experience.

reviews.title: Incubo terribile.
reviews.positives: Purtroppo non mi è piaciuto niente, stanza per chi non vuole accendere aria condizionata e terribile perché spara direttamente sul letto, non puoi aprire le finestre perché ci sono i motori di tutte le altra aree condizionate delle altre stanze siamo scappati in un altro Hotel dopo aver chiesto e visto che le stanze disponibili erano tutte uguali , hotel non lo fa Netflix , lo fa la qualità del riposo , terribile esperienza !! Posti così non dovrebbero stare in piattaforma serie .
reviews.negatives: Semplicemente Tutto, e quando una coppia di 50 enni decide di andare via alle 22 di sera dopo aver pagato due notti , esercente dovrebbe riflettere ed anche la piattaforma!!

reviews.title: Recommend if you need to go near T3 station.
reviews.text: The hotel is quite clean, the room is small but close to station T3 and right on a major road, making it easier to catch a taxi, and it’s nice that the hotel is equipped with Netflix.

reviews.title: Albergo preso x partenza da aeroporto alle 4.00 am molto confortevole ed economico 👍👍
reviews.positives: Posizione vicino aeroporto ma ben servita
reviews.negatives: Nulla

reviews.title: It was nice to stay for a while.
reviews.text: I stayed briefly before moving towards Rakja, and since it was affordable, I didn't have high expectations. However, it seems it had just been remodeled; the room was clean, the staff was friendly, and everything was good. The breakfast felt a bit lacking, but I heard they provide pho if you request it (I didn't know, so I didn't get to eat it). Still, with Shin Ramyeon and Jjapaghetti available, I wasn't too disappointed. It was surprisingly good for the price. It felt like a clean motel in Korea. Oh! Later I realized it was also close to the airport. I highly recommend it.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Hotel molto accogliente, camera confortevole e servizi ottimi. Consigliatissimo!

reviews.title: Great place for traveling
reviews.text: Everything is good except there is no water sprayer in the toilet.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Goede kwaliteit
reviews.negatives: Alleen een klein bovenluikje verser geen ramen

reviews.title: Worth the money
reviews.text: The clean room is well-equipped, just missing a bidet ^^ But it's okay, the experience was very good staying at this hotel, I have nothing to complain about.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room was clean and tidy. I stayed in a large TV room with good facilities, and the staff were very friendly. I think could be improved is the breakfast. The main course options were either fried eggs with bread or noodle soup. I wouldn’t mind paying a bit more to have more choices. Overall, the hotel’s cost was worth it.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
사진과 동일한 편안한 호텔이였습니다.
배우자 혹은 여자친구, 가족과 방문하기 좋은 호텔입니다.
시설은 깔끔하고 깨끗했습니다. 컨시어지도 친철하고 편안합니다.

주요 시설 거리나 위치도 좋습니다.
가성비가 매우 좋으므로 방문 추천드립니다.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I have been stay in a few place closed to airport . This is my first time so happy with everything in here . I’m checked in late at 1am. But the staff is so friendly. The room new, clean , nice smell , make me feel so comfy . They so professional. Definitely come here every time when I’m in HCM. Don’t need to try any different hotel anymore . Yahhh

reviews.title: 가성비 대비 좋은 호텔
reviews.positives: 침대가 편안하고 조용해서 좋았고 루프탑에서 시간보내는게 즐거웠읍니다.

reviews.title: Best value hotel!
reviews.text: The hotel owner is Korean, so everything was neat and satisfying!

reviews.title: 강력추천 - 깨끗하고 좋은 LATOUT
reviews.positives: 공항에서 가깝고  호텔이 전반적으로  깨끗하고 깔끔합니다. 호텔방도 넓고 쉴수있는 소파가 있으며 대형 TV가 있어서 호텔방안에 머무는것이 편안했읍니다.  기본적인 메뉴지만 조식이 제공되고 TOP층에있는 테라스는 커피를 마시면서 CITY VIEW를 즐길수있는 최고의 장소였읍니다.

reviews.title: New room, convenient and friendly staff.
reviews.text: The hotel has only been operating for a month, everything is very good, and the staff is very friendly. I hope next time, the hotel will refresh and improve the breakfast buffet.

reviews.title: 숙박 후기
reviews.positives: 공항에서 10분도 안걸려 도착했습니다.  시설은 깔끔하고 직원들이 친절합니다.  청소 상태가 좋았고 시설은 깔끔하였습니다.
reviews.negatives: 특별하게는 없었던것 같습니다.

reviews.title: Perfect airport stopover, though service standards varied
reviews.text:
Perfect for an airport stopover. I chose this hotel for its location and found it to be quiet, clean, and efficient. Service was initially a highlight: the porter was very helpful at check in and check out, taking care of my bags from the moment I stepped out of the car, and the check-in was quick and seamless. The room was well-appointed with a very comfortable bed, though I did find the linens slightly irritating to the skin, which affected my sleep quality. Breakfast was another high point thanks to the hardworking attendant who managed the entire service alone with professionalism and a friendly attitude.


However, the only disappointing part of my stay was the check-out. The female staff member (Ihao?) was incredibly nonchalant and cold, providing a poor attitude during our interaction. Seeing her eating in front of guests was unprofessional and fell far below the minimum customer service standards expected. It was a shame to end such a pleasant stay on such a negative note

reviews.title: 위치 굿 룸 컨디션 굿 직원 굿
reviews.positives: 숙소에 많이 투자하는 편은 아니지만 그래도 룸 컨디션에 대한 기준은 어느 정도 있는데 최고의 선택이었습니다ㅋㅋ 저렴하고 공항 근처라 예약했는데 가격대비 너무 좋아서 놀랐습니다. 최근에 리모델링 한 건지 모르겠지만 실내가 깨끗하고 룸 컨디션도 기대했던 것 보다 훨씬 좋았어요! 직원들도 친절해서 묵는 동안 불편함없이 기분 좋게 지냈습니다. 가성비 좋아서 다음에도 예약할 것 같네욥 굿굿

reviews.title: Gut für eine Übernachtung
reviews.text:
Die Lage ist sehr gut. 
Für ein, oder 2 Übernachtungen ok.
Nähe zum Flughafen sehr gut. 
Sauberkeit lässt zu wünschen übrig. 
Zimmer zum Teil ohne Fenster. 
Frühstück gut. 
Personal hilfsbereit und freundlich. 
In der Nähe gibt es Supermärkte und Restaurants. 
Insgesamt ok. Mehr nicht

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: 신축호텔이라 그런지 내부가 깨끗하고,  청소가 잘되어 있었으며, 직원들이 친절해서 좋았습니다. 재방문의사 있습니다..

reviews.title: Gut für einen Zwischenstopp
reviews.text: Ich war für eine Nacht in dem Hotel. Es ist nah am Flughafen und daher gut geeignet als Zwischenstop. Das Zimmer war sauber, das Badezimmer wie neu. Das Frühstück war sehr durchschnittlich und man musste sich die Eier selbst machen. Wenig Obst. Aber sonst in Ordnung.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
공항 근처라 첫날이나 마지막 날 이용하기 너무 편리한 숙소인 것 같아요.
신축이라고 들었는데 그래서 그런지 너무 깔끔하고 쾌적했구요, 직원분들도 친절하셔서 너무 잘 머물다 갑니다.
가성비 매우 좋아서 다음에도 방문할 것 같습니다.

reviews.title: Perfekt für 1 Nacht
reviews.text: Passend für eine Übernachtung in der Nähe des Airports. Frühstück war schlicht, aber sehr frisch und sauber. Unser Zimmer wirkte nicht tip-top gereinigt. Ein langes schwarzes unübersehbares Haar in der Schublade am Bett. Wand im Fußbodenbereich sehr dreckig (vermutlich hat  sich mal jemand übergeben und die Wand wurde danach nicht richtig sauber gemacht bzw. einfach mal abgewischt). Sind spät eingecheckt und waren müde. Haben es deshalb akzeptiert, da es morgens um 7:15 wieder weiter gegangen ist. Check-In war super schnell. Nebenan Supermarkt und Cafés etc. Leider hat das Hotel nicht vorab auf Anfragen per E-Mail oder auch via Chat über Agoda.

reviews.title: 탄소녓 골프장 가기 완벽한 호텔
reviews.positives: 조식과 함께 한국 라면과 군만두를 먹을 수 있는 것도 좋았고 일단 위치가 공항에서 3분거리라 탄소녓 골프장으로 골프치러 가기 너무 좋았어요. 근처에 편의점과 마트도 2개가 있어서 편의성도 너무 좋구요
reviews.negatives: 4월말에 오픈 했다고 들었는데 새 호텔이라서 그런지 새집에서 나는 냄새가 조금 났습니다.

reviews.title: Modern and clean hotel
reviews.text: Had a very nice experience in this hotel. It's pretty new so the rooms are quite unused and super clean. Staff is extraordinary polite and helpful.

reviews.title: 탄소녓 골프장 가기 완벽한 호텔
reviews.positives: 조식과 함께 한국 라면과 군만두를 먹을 수 있는 것도 좋았고 일단 위치가 공항에서 3분거리라 탄소녓 골프장으로 골프치러 가기 너무 좋았어요. 근처에 편의점과 마트도 2개가 있어서 편의성도 너무 좋구요
reviews.negatives: 4월말에 오픈 했다고 들었는데 새 호텔이라서 그런지 새집에서 나는 냄새가 조금 났습니다.

reviews.title: Heerlijk geslapen
reviews.text: Fijn hotel voor een nachtje. Goed bed, heerlijke douche, schoone kamer. Prima ontbijt, loopafstand van T3 domestic flights

reviews.title: 추천추천!
reviews.positives: 출장차 혼자 머물렀는데, 신축이라 그런지 깔끔하고 깨끗해서 좋았습니다. 직원분들도 친절하고 공항 근처라 이동도 편리했어요. 출장객에게 추천할만한 숙소입니다.

reviews.title: シャワーがぬるい
reviews.text: 空港近く。コンビニやローカルレストランがいっぱいある。マットレスは良かった。

reviews.title: 두번째 방문 후기~
reviews.positives: 두번째 방문입니다. 여전히 깔끔한 시설에 친절한 직원응대로 편하게 쉴 수 있었습니다. 이른 아침 한국행 비행기 탑승 관계로 하루전날 늦은밤 체크인해서 푹 쉬었습니다. 일전 방문시 조식에 커피가 없어서 조금 아쉬웠는데, 고객 피드백을 바로 반영하여 개선한점이 좋네요~
reviews.negatives: 특별하게는 없었던것 같습니다.

reviews.title: 나름 괜찮아요
reviews.text: 첫호텔 직원들 친절하고 착함 가격대비 괜찮아요 조식 신라면 짜장라면. 있고 계란후라이 요청하면 해줌 맛있게 잘먹었음 단점은 개미가 한마리씩 기어 나오고 3일동안 청소해주지 않고 물만 리필해주고 수건도 요청해야 줌

reviews.title: 호치민 아니 베트남 최고의 숙박시설
reviews.positives:
숙소가 정말정말 깨끗했습니다
 한국 비즈니스 호텔 이상입니다.
또한 직원들도 교육을 잘받았는지 굉장히 친절해서 숙박기간동안 기분이 좋았습니다.
위치는 두말할필요없이 공항 근처여서 최고의 위치라고 생각합니다.
출장목적이든 휴가목적이든 다시 호치민 오게되면 무조건 방문해서 숙박할 겁니다.
어떠한 목적이든 100퍼센트 추천드립니다. 꼭 머무세요!
reviews.negatives: 전혀..없습니다..

reviews.title: 직원들의 친절도는 높으나 아쉬운 방음시설
reviews.text:
방음문제가 아주 심각합니다
윗층 아래층의 TV소리 대화소리가 잘 들리며 외부 도로의 차소리가 모두 들립니다

reviews.title: 깔끔한 호텔
reviews.positives:
그동안 베트남에서 묶었던 호텔 중 가성비가 제일좋았던 호텔
무엇보다 객실이 아주깔끔하게 관리되고 있었고  침구도 뽀송뽀송해서 기분좋게 쉴수있었어요.
reviews.negatives: 조식이 그냥 평범함

reviews.title: 위치가 괜찮은 호텔
reviews.text:
한국에 돌아오기전에 잠시 있었는데
위치가 롯데 마트에서도 가깝고, 공항도 가깝고, 주변에 커피 및 음식 먹기도 아주 좋아요
다음에도 다시 이용할 계획입니다

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: 공항 인근에 위치해 있으며, 접근성이 좋았습니다. 오픈한지 얼마 안된것으로 알고 있는데, 전반적으로 시설이 깔끔하고 직원들이 친절하였습니다.

reviews.title: 공항근처숙소
reviews.text: 공항근처숙소로 하루 머물기 괜찮아요. 침구류가 매우 깨끗해서 편히 잤어요.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
와이프랑 방문하였는데
시설도 깨끗 청결하고 편의 시설 편의점 카페 등 가깝고
공항도 가까워서 만족했어요
에어컨도 잘 나오고 시원한 여행에
직원분분들도 친절하셔서 기분 좋은 여행이였습니다
다음에 또 베트남 가면 방문하려고요

reviews.title: 만족합니다
reviews.text:
출장차 왔는데 
하루 묶어보고 2 주 연속으로 지내고 있어요 
만족하는데 ㅠ 런더리 서비스가 안되는게 유일하게 아쉽네요~~!!

reviews.title: 만족스럽습니다.
reviews.positives: 공항에서 가깝고 남자들끼리 골프여행 오기엔 위치가 딱 좋은것 같습니다. 저희는 원래 공항 근처 골프장을 주로 이용해서 숙소에서 골프장까지 차로 15분 정도면 도착하니깐 편하더라구요. 아직 지은지 얼마 안된거같아 시설도 깨끗한 편이구요. 근처에 카페랑 편의점이 있어서 편리했던 것 같습니다. 직원들도 친절합니다.
reviews.negatives: 아쉬웠던 점이라기 보다는 도착시간 1시간 전쯤에 방 에어컨을 틀어놓거나 해주셨으면 좋긴할거같습니다. 워낙 더운 나라다 보니 바로 시원함을 느끼고싶은데 그게 안되더라구요.

reviews.title: 조아요
reviews.text: 조아요

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: 离机场很近
reviews.negatives: 窗户非常小，卫生间有异味

reviews.title: 깔끔하고 좋은 호텔
reviews.text: 직원들이 모두들 친절하고 방은 깨끗하고 침대는 편함. 주변에 마트나 편의점도 많고 공항도 가까워서 접근성도 좋은편. 가격대비 너무 좋은 호텔.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: מיטות מאוד נוחות וכריות מעולות, מקלחת טובה. ארוחת בוקר טובה לישראלים, ירקות טריים, ביצים, לחם, מיץ תפוזים סחוט, קפה . יש גם דברים נוספים כמו קורנפלקס , נקניקים וכו למי שאוהב.  תמורה מצויינת למחיר.
reviews.negatives: כ 25 דק עם גראב למרכז. אבל ידעתי זאת מראש. החדרים עם חלון קטנטן לפיר פנימי. אבל יש מזגן שעושה את העבודה.

reviews.negatives: Tấm trải giường ko được sạch cho lắm. Một yêu cầu phải chờ tới hơn 1 tiếng và cần phải nhắc lại 2 lần.

reviews.text:

리모델링해서 그런지 너무 쾌적했다. 가격 생각하면 더더욱 추천. 가성비 최고의 호텔임과 동시에 훌륭한 부띠끄 호텔임.

reviews.text: 房间没有吹风机，而且洗手间的马桶一直有臭味。酒店附近很便利，有很多店和超市，服务人员态度也很好。

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Clean room, good services, the officers are kind. Thay can help us to give information we need. Just ask.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Khách sạn mới xây hay sao mà thấy mọi thứ đều mới tinh, concept hiện đại, phòng diện tích không to nhưng vừa nhu cầu mình, cần tiện nghi hơn diện tích, đặc biệt giường nệm êm như khách sạn 5 sao vậy á. Nhân viên nhiệt tình. Vị trí gần nhà ga T3 mới khai trương, rất tiện đi lại. Lần sau sẽ quay lại.

reviews.text: No hot water in the shower

reviews.title: Suosittelen vahvasti, toimi yhdeks yöksi, luultavasti useammaksikin
reviews.positives: Erittäin siisti ja kaikki tarpeellinen löytyi. Sänky, tyynyt ja peitot tosi hyvät ja ilmastointi toimi. Ei mitään moitittavaa. Erinomainen hinta-laatusuhde! Ok aamupala.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Lễ tân nữ không hỗ trợ khách

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Хорошее место расположение ( рядом с аэропортом) , очень чистый , хороший завтрак
reviews.negatives: Мне не смогли предоставить номер , который я бронировал , предоставили категорией ниже с блоками кондиционером под окном

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Nhân viên nữ ko thân thiện..ko hỗ trợ khách hàng khi gặp vấn đề trục trặc xảy ra

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives:
В целом чистенько, мебель не старая, приятный дизайн. На крыше уютная зона для отдыха. Завтрак скромный, но вкусный: свежие фрукты, сыр, яичница, кофе - все привычное европейцу. Расположение тоже очень удачное: рядом аэропорт (поэтому особенно будет удобно тем, кому нужно одну ночь провести между перелетами), при этом поблизости есть неплохие заведения, где можно без опаски поесть или выпить кофе)
Персонал приветливый!
reviews.negatives: Крошечное окошко, которое было в номере, было очень грязным и с подтеками.. что создавало очень неприятные впечатления при взгляде на него. Грязные стены в комнате. Но особенно расстроил запах канализации в душе и желтые грязные круги, которые оставались в туалете (видимо, вода застаивается). Также есть проблемы с регулировкой воды, очень долго настраивала температуру и так в итоге и не смогла нормально отрегулировать.

reviews.title: Lễ tân không chuyên nghiệp
reviews.text: Mình bị trễ chuyến bay và nhờ bạn gọi điện dời ngày đặc phòng lễ Tân ok hết đến khi đến thì nói là ko có thông báo dời ngày  chán thiệt tất cả phòng đều ok nhưng bị tuột cảm xúc luôn

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Комнаты как на картинке. Кровать и подушки удобные. Найти отель было легко. Заезжали после 1 ночи, на ресепшн были сотрудники. Работает карта unionpay  рсхб. Завтрак нормальный, яишница, салат, сок, кофе, Йогурт. Добираться из/до аэропорта 10 минут на такси. Адрес соответствует действительности. В номере, зелёный чай, чайник, збные щетки, вода в бутылках.
reviews.negatives: В комнате окно без шумоизоляции, с улицы утром много шума. Кондиционер прям над кроватью, в санузеле запах канализации, вода не горячая, чуть тёплая.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Phòng cần cải thiện cách âm vì ngay sát cầu thang nên dễ bị làm phiền. Máy lạnh kêu to và dễ mất sóng điện thoại

reviews.negatives: Расположение кондиционера (дует прямо  на кровать)

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Phòng bí, ko có cửa sổ, vệ sinh bị nồng mùo cống, hố ga lên nên rất khó chịu.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Очень хороший отель. Замечательный персонал. Очень хорошие кровати и постельное. В них просто утопаешь. Большой хороший телевизор, кайф смотреть всякое. В душе офигенные средства для мытья (сказали что сами их делают, мы хотели купить😅)
reviews.negatives: Кондиционеры плохие и старые. Мы меняли номер, так как в первом он работал совсем плохо. Во втором было получше, но всё равно не было прохладно. Я не могу спать в тепле, это несколько испортило впечатление. Очень надеюсь что они исправят это. Вернусь туда ещё раз.

reviews.title: Krótka noc w Ho Chi Minh.
reviews.positives: Szukałem hotelu blisko lotniska. Pokój bardzo czysty, dużo udogodnień jak na tę cenę i standard. Obsługa przyjazna i mówiła po angielsku. W pobliżu małe sklepy. Okolica mało turystyczna, co mi się akurat podobało.
reviews.negatives: Okno wychodziło na ścianę. Głośna klimatyzacja przez którą ciężko się spało.

reviews.title: Bad really bad hotel with high charges. They exaggerate  and cheating money.
reviews.positives: I did not like  to stay this low class hotel . But charging high price . Breakfast  facility  is nothing it fake announced in add. No windows in rooms . It was very tinny room. I never  recommended this hotel to new customers. Dont waste money. Stay in this hotel  was bad experience  of my life .
reviews.negatives:
Nothing like . No windows in room. Small rooms. No hot water in bathroom.  No breakfast even they charged  me breakfast  in payment.  I request to booking 
.com to refund my breakfast  payment.

reviews.title: Brown dot hotel
reviews.text: Phòng ốc sạch sẽ, đẹp

reviews.title: No window in the deluxe room
reviews.positives: No so much , to be honest.
reviews.negatives: There is no window in the room (we booked the deluxe). The air conditioning can be set initially but after some time it reverts back to 17 Celsius, no matter how was the set up, so it's freezing and the air flow is directed towards the bed. We then had to switch it off and at that point the room was hot. We could not have breakfast as we left early and no price reduction was possible (we asked). The hotel is not even so close to the airport,  as you need at least 20 minutes by taxi,  if not more, due to crazy traffic. Nothing really around. Overall, not recommended.

reviews.title: very good value of money
reviews.text: perfect option for someone stay overnight and wait for the flight. the room is clean, well equipped. the price is cheap for what they offer. friendly staff as well

reviews.title: Just managed
reviews.positives: Fair
reviews.negatives: Overall standard

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: tốt

reviews.title: Disappointing.
reviews.positives: The staff were helpful and the bed comfortable.
reviews.negatives:
It wasn’t in a great area so looking for food in the evening wasn’t easy. 
Although comfortable bed there was a noose from (I think) other room’s air conditioning which meant I couldn’t sleep. 
Breakfast was adequate. 
There were long hairs on the sofa. Not mine. 
I had booked an airport hotel thinking it would be adjacent to the airport. This is guess isn’t  the hotel’s fault but it was a 15 minute drive into quite a worn out neighbourhood.

reviews.title: good
reviews.text: Excellent service

reviews.title: Breakfast was a disaster very limited, no coffee or tea,only noodles and fried egg
reviews.positives: Room was good
reviews.negatives: Air conditioner was very loud it was a reverse cycle air conditioner

reviews.title: 1 ночь в пересадку
reviews.text:
Единственный доступный отель с приличным номером попался мне в ночную пересадку. 
Забронировала в 2 часа ночи и сраз заселилась. 
Номер без окон достался, но мне нужно было уже в 7 утра выезжать, поэтому сильно не расстроилась.
Повезло что был завтрак. 
Цена завышена

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The person who helped me with breakfast was very friendly.
reviews.negatives: The first room I stayed in was so full of ants that I felt like I couldn't stay there any longer, so I paid more and moved to a different room. The toilet in my new room was clogged. Hotels in Ho Chi Minh City are similar, but the noise level is no joke.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Хорошее чистое место . Но вот дверь нужно починить )

reviews.title: Good for transit
reviews.positives: Close to airport

reviews.title: Хороший отель рядом с аэропортом
reviews.text: Были в данном отеле во время длительной пересадки в Хошимине. Отель небольшой но новый, номера также небольшие но очень современные и уютные. В номерах есть ванна, правда не всегда есть горячая вода. В номере огромный телевизор. Звукоизоляция хорошая. Рекомендуем данное отель тем у кого длительные пересадки.

reviews.title: Was okay for transit stay
reviews.negatives: No windows and not very clean. It wasn’t very close to the airport either.

reviews.title: 無言
reviews.text:
1.當晚女性朋友來訪跟前台說上去拿東西15分鐘左右離開！硬要50萬小費才可以上去
2.床鋪上根本沒有打掃乾淨！還有上個房客的毛髮！真噁心
3.真心覺得最不開心的旅程

reviews.title: Good for a short overnight stay
reviews.positives: Good room, huge tv. Reasonably close to airport. Close to local restaurants
reviews.negatives:
Lack of usable social space. 
Very basic breakfast.

reviews.title: 以後不會再入住
reviews.text: 第一次入住就遇到停電，隔壁店家都沒停電，就只有這間旅館停電，一次停還兩個小時，完全不會主動通知客戶，還要客戶自己摸黑走下樓去詢問

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The pillows and the bed are comfortable.The breakfast is good..it's convenient for the bank, pharmacy and airport..They are great..
reviews.negatives: I don't like the scam taxi driver from the hochiminh airport.,😡

reviews.title: 住宿心得
reviews.text: 員工訓練需再加強。2025-07-06八樓***房早上10點多，有員工開門進來，沒有按鈴直接闖入，看到我在睡覺，才關門走人。我不知道他進來要幹嘛.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Close to airport, polite and helpful staff, comfortable bed,breakfast - everything you need in between the flights .Thank you!
reviews.negatives: The room doesn't have a window..It was OK because we just stayed overnight.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Very close to the airport, but cleanliness and room security can be improved.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Very good , because we need 1 night close to the airport.
